title: AMTP Message
description: An AMTP message (kind 24400). A signed Nostr event. A money-message is this object carrying a 'money' tag.

id.description: sha256 of the serialized event — content-addressed, tamper-evident.

tags.description: Array of tag arrays. Recognized AMTP tags below; unknown tags MUST be ignored.

$comment: Recognized tags: ['to','name@domain'] (recipient address, required); ['subject','...']; ['money','<sats>'] (presence makes this a money-message); ['claim','<lnurl-withdraw>'] (for non-Lightning recipients); ['proof','<payment_hash>'] (settlement proof if paid inline).

examples.content: Thanks for today. Here are 2100 sats.
